The situation is crystal clear. I've been circling this for too long. Time to act decisively.

**The problem:** `engine/skills.py` (file) and `engine/skills/` (directory) coexist. Python can't resolve this cleanly — the directory shadows the file, but has no `__init__.py`, so `from engine.skills import SkillRegistry` breaks.

**The fix:** Move `SkillRegistry` into `engine/skills/__init__.py`, delete the standalone file.

>>> WRITE(engine/skills/__init__.py)
